    def test_member_can_list_and_view_project(seeded_state):
        project_id = seeded_state["project_id"]
        run_id = seeded_state["run_id"]
        expected_name = f"harbor-proj-{run_id}"
    
        for who in ("member_a", "member_b"):
            token = seeded_state[who]["token"]
            list_resp = requests.get(
                f"{BASE_URL}/api/collections/projects/records",
                headers=_auth(token),
                timeout=15,
            )
            assert list_resp.status_code == 200, (
                f"{who} expected to list projects (HTTP 200), got "
                f"{list_resp.status_code}: {list_resp.text}"
            )
            items = list_resp.json().get("items", [])
            ids = [it.get("id") for it in items]
>           assert project_id in ids, (
                f"{who} should see project {project_id} in their list response, got ids={ids}."
            )
E           AssertionError: member_a should see project 2knopsupewy5y6o in their list response, got ids=[].
E           assert '2knopsupewy5y6o' in []

tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_member_can_create_task
tests.trace:
seeded_state = {'member_a': {'email': 'member-a-zr-6gujzwy@example.com', 'id': 'v4uv7lp6w0xcxtr', 'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5c...GFibGUiOnRydWUsInR5cGUiOiJhdXRoIn0.J5EurSa7nRPvqZ68Wwh4wFokTs0aD8nhKqFR18va_3E'}, 'project_id': '2knopsupewy5y6o', ...}

    def test_member_can_create_task(seeded_state):
        token = seeded_state["member_a"]["token"]
        project_id = seeded_state["project_id"]
        run_id = seeded_state["run_id"]
        title = f"task-by-a-{run_id}"
    
        resp = requests.post(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/collections/tasks/records",
            json={
                "title": title,
                "description": "created by member A",
                "project": project_id,
            },
            headers=_auth(token),
            timeout=15,
        )
>       assert resp.status_code == 200, (
            "memberA should be able to create a task in their own project (HTTP 200), got "
            f"{resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
        )
E       AssertionError: memberA should be able to create a task in their own project (HTTP 200), got 400: {"data":{},"message":"Failed to create record.","status":400}
E         
E       assert 400 == 200
E        +  where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
